creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know about this hidden oasis between two mansions in Maida Vale? It’s actually London’s oldest garden centre, established over 170 years ago in 1851! You’ll find a huge range of indoor and outdoor plants, trees, flowers and accessories as well as historic glasshouses and a wonderful cafe serving lunch, coffee and matcha!

Save this to your London bucket list and share with someone who would love to go!
📍 @cliftonnurseries 5A Clifton Villas, London W9 2PH
🗓️ Open 7 days a week

transcription.text: Hidden Spots in London Part 13 and this time we're going to Maida Vale to a street that looks pretty normal but what you didn't know is that hidden between two of these mansions is a path that will lead you to London's oldest garden centre. This is Clifton Nurseries established in 1851. This historic hidden oasis has been inspiring gardeners for over 170 years and it offers a large selection of indoor and outdoor plants, flowers, trees and accessories. There's also a gorgeous cafe on site with indoor seating inside a glass house as well as an outdoor terrace. It really feels like you've escaped London here. It's definitely one to check out, share it with someone who would love to go.
